case_title: GSPA LLC VS. DYLANN BROWN ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GSPA LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, DYLANN DERRIES, BONADIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 168 BLUXOME STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72546574)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, DYLANN DERRIES, BONADIE
